_meta.description: Formation V2 + Army Mastery reference data

1001.name: Formation: Shark
1001.desc: When 2/4/5/6 commanders use this formation in a Rally, they will receive an additional 3%/5%/10%/15% Damage Increase and Decreased Damage taken, respectively.

1002.name: Formation: Scorpion
1002.desc: When 2/4/5/6 commanders use this formation in a Rally, they will receive an additional 3%/5%/10%/15% Damage Increase and Decreased Damage taken, respectively.

1003.name: Formation: Eagle
1003.desc: When 2/4/5/6 commanders use this formation in a Rally, they will receive an additional 3%/5%/10%/15% Damage Increase and Decreased Damage taken, respectively.

1001.name: Swift Strike
1001.t5_desc: When the unit in this slot triggers <id=600001>, it will immediately launch an attack that deals 100% damage.

1002.name: Weakness Exploitation
1002.t5_desc: The <id=600002> triggered by this slot will now deal 30% more damage in a counterattack.

1003.name: Eagle Strike
1003.t5_desc: Each round, attack a random target 1 time, dealing 60% damage. When defending in base, attack an additional time, dealing 120% damage. Heavy Trooper will not trigger the Eagle Strike.

1.name: Assault
1.desc:
Increases the Attack of the front-row, causes more damage
A commonly used formation with no obvious flaws

2.name: Fortified Formation
2.desc:
Compromise the front-row damage for higher survivability, while compromising the survivability of the back row for more damage.
Ideally for tough battles. In some circumstances this formation works better than the offense formation.

3.name: The Shadow
3.desc: Increase the Critical Hit Rate of the mid and back row. Dodge and Critical hit effect unlocks at Lv. 5/10/15, which is effective for skills that cause multiple damages and 100% critical hit

2800000.name: Formation 101
2800000.desc: The 101 manual on formations that are commonly applied in battles. A required item for formation research

2800001.name: Formation Manual - Assault
2800001.desc: A detailed battle report of the Assault Formation. An exclusive item required for advancing the Assault Formation.

2800002.name: Formation Manual - Fortified
2800002.desc: A detailed battle report of the Fortified Formation. An exclusive item required for advancing the Fortified Formation.

2800003.name: Formation Manual - Defense
2800003.desc: A detailed battle report of the Defense Formation. An exclusive item required for advancing the Defense Formation.

2800004.name: Full Defense Formation Breakdown
2800004.desc: Full breakdown of All-Defense Formation data. An exclusive item required for advancing the All-Defense Formation.

2800005.name: Swept-Wing Formation Breakdown
2800005.desc: Full breakdown of Swept-Wing Formation data. An exclusive item required for advancing the Swept-Wing Formation.

2801000.name: Universal Formation Upgrade Guide
2801000.desc: A complete guide that encompasses fundamental information for upgrading Formation levels.
